questions.q: Tesla recently started selling Model 3s in Canada at its lowest price ever. Where are these specific EVs manufactured?
According to a 2026 Canadian Security Intelligence Service (CSIS) report, nearly one in ten counter-terrorism investigations now involves whom?
A Federal Court recently ruled that a failed refugee claimant and convicted identity thief can stay in Canada because he previously acted as an informant against which gang?
Which destructive, invasive insect was recently discovered in Ontario, renewing concerns about its threat to Canada's vineyards and fruit trees?
Due to privacy concerns, the Ontario Lottery and Gaming Corporation recently changed its policy on announcing jackpot winners. What information is now released to the media?
options: Only their first name and last initial
No names are released at all
Only the winner's city of residence
questions.correctText: Only their first name and last initial
